no: Adds Marcus, a barbarian companion who can follow as a familiar or party member. Includes plasma weapons, magic runes, Set Items (Crom's Wrath 2pc, Immortal King 6pc), boss challenges with achievements, and secret content. Very powerful items designed for highest difficulty. A bunny finds you on any map to start. BG2EE/EET. English only.
sum: Overpowered-edition barbarian companion NPC for BG2EE/EET.

co.no: Adds Marcus NPC, new items, bosses, challenges, achievements. Uses PDIALOG.2DA, SPLPROT.2DA, custom scripts.
